name: AXT INC
summary: AXT, Inc. is a worldwide materials science company that develops and produces high-performance compound and single element semiconductor substrates (wafers), including Indium Phosphide (InP), Gallium Arsenide (GaAs), and Germanium (Ge). Through consolidated subsidiaries, AXT also produces raw materials such as purified gallium and pyrolytic boron nitride (pBN) crucibles, used internally and sold externally. Products serve data centers, 5G, fiber optics, LEDs, solar cells, and consumer devices. All manufacturing occurs in the People's Republic of China.

products.name: Indium Phosphide (InP) Substrates
products.description: Semiconductor wafer substrates for data center connectivity, 5G, fiber optics, silicon photonics, and consumer devices in diameters 2, 3, 4, 6 inches.

products.name: Semi-Insulating Gallium Arsenide (GaAs) Substrates
products.description: Wafer substrates for high-speed microwave components, power amplifiers, Wi-Fi, satellite communications, and solar cells.

products.name: Semi-Conducting Gallium Arsenide (GaAs) Substrates
products.description: Wafer substrates for LEDs, VCSELs, industrial lasers, 3D sensing, and micro-LED displays.

products.name: Germanium (Ge) Substrates
products.description: Wafer substrates for multi-junction solar cells, space photovoltaics, infrared detectors, and carrier wafers for LEDs.

products.name: Purified Gallium (6N+ and 7N+)
products.description: High-purity gallium used in GaAs substrate production and sold externally for single crystal ingots and alloys.

products.name: Pyrolytic Boron Nitride (pBN) Crucibles and Parts
products.description: Crucibles and insulating parts for single-crystal ingot growth, OLED tools, MOCVD, and MBE reactors.

products.name: Boron Trioxide (B2O3)
products.description: Encapsulant used in the ingot growth of III-V compound semiconductors.

products.name: InP Base Material
products.description: Starting material for growing indium phosphide single crystal ingots used in substrate manufacturing.

products.name: Gallium-Magnesium Alloy
products.description: Used for synthesis of organo-gallium compounds in epitaxial growth on semiconductor wafers.
